title: ECA Configuration
description: Configuration schema for ECA (Editor Code Assistant). See https://eca.dev/config/introduction for full documentation.
markdownDescription: Configuration schema for ECA (Editor Code Assistant). See https://eca.dev/config/introduction for full documentation.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for editor validation support.
$schema.markdownDescription: JSON Schema reference for editor validation support.

providers.description: LLM provider configurations. Each key is the provider name.
providers.markdownDescription: LLM provider configurations. Each key is the provider name.

defaultModel.description: Default model in format 'provider/model'. When null, ECA decides the default model.
defaultModel.markdownDescription: Default model in format 'provider/model'. When null, ECA decides the default model.

defaultAgent.description: The default agent to use for new chats.
defaultAgent.markdownDescription: The default agent to use for new chats.

chatRetentionDays.description: Number of days to keep old chats and tool call output cache before cleanup. Set to 0 to disable cleanup entirely.
chatRetentionDays.markdownDescription: Number of days to keep old chats and tool call output cache before cleanup. Set to `0` to disable cleanup entirely.

agent.description: Named agent configurations for different workflows.
agent.markdownDescription: Named agent configurations for different workflows.

defaultBehavior.description: Deprecated: use 'defaultAgent' instead. Backward compatible alias.
defaultBehavior.markdownDescription: Deprecated: use 'defaultAgent' instead. Backward compatible alias.

behavior.description: Deprecated: use 'agent' instead. Backward compatible alias.
behavior.markdownDescription: Deprecated: use 'agent' instead. Backward compatible alias.

hooks.description: Shell actions that run before or after specific events.
hooks.markdownDescription: Shell actions that run before or after specific events.

rules.description: Rules are contexts passed to the LLM during a prompt, useful to tune prompts or LLM responses.
rules.markdownDescription: Rules are contexts passed to the LLM during a prompt, useful to tune prompts or LLM responses.

path.description: Path to a rule file or directory (relative to workspace root or absolute). Directories are loaded recursively.
path.markdownDescription: Path to a rule file or directory (relative to workspace root or absolute). Directories are loaded recursively.

disabledTools.description: List of tool names to disable globally.
disabledTools.markdownDescription: List of tool names to disable globally.

path.description: Path to a command prompt markdown file or directory. Directories load markdown files recursively.
path.markdownDescription: Path to a command prompt markdown file or directory. Directories load markdown files recursively.

skills.description: Skill files or directories to load.
skills.markdownDescription: Skill files or directories to load.

path.description: Path to a skill file or directory. Directories load SKILL.md files recursively.
path.markdownDescription: Path to a skill file or directory. Directories load SKILL.md files recursively.

customTools.description: User-defined command-line tools the LLM can use.
customTools.markdownDescription: User-defined command-line tools the LLM can use.

mcpTimeoutSeconds.description: Timeout in seconds for MCP server operations.
mcpTimeoutSeconds.markdownDescription: Timeout in seconds for MCP server operations.

lspTimeoutSeconds.description: Timeout in seconds for LSP operations.
lspTimeoutSeconds.markdownDescription: Timeout in seconds for LSP operations.

streamIdleTimeoutSeconds.description: Timeout in seconds to wait without receiving data before considering a LLM stream stalled.
streamIdleTimeoutSeconds.markdownDescription: Timeout in seconds to wait without receiving data before considering a LLM stream stalled.

welcomeMessage.description: Custom welcome message shown when ECA starts.
welcomeMessage.markdownDescription: Custom welcome message shown when ECA starts.

autoCompactPercentage.description: Context window usage percentage at which auto-compact triggers.
autoCompactPercentage.markdownDescription: Context window usage percentage at which auto-compact triggers.

includeParentAgentsFiles.description: When true, also include AGENTS.md files from each workspace folder's parent directories, ordered outermost parent first, then the workspace's own AGENTS.md.
includeParentAgentsFiles.markdownDescription: When `true`, also include `AGENTS.md` files from each workspace folder's parent directories, ordered outermost parent first, then the workspace's own `AGENTS.md`.

type.description: Type of ignore file to use.
type.markdownDescription: Type of ignore file to use.

repoMap.description: Repository map configuration for context building.
repoMap.markdownDescription: Repository map configuration for context building.

maxTotalEntries.description: Maximum total entries in the repo map.
maxTotalEntries.markdownDescription: Maximum total entries in the repo map.

maxEntriesPerDir.description: Maximum entries per directory in the repo map.
maxEntriesPerDir.markdownDescription: Maximum entries per directory in the repo map.

model.description: Model to use for inline completions.
model.markdownDescription: Model to use for inline completions.

model.description: Model to use for rewrites. Defaults to the same model selection as chat.
model.markdownDescription: Model to use for rewrites. Defaults to the same model selection as chat.

fullFileMaxLines.description: Maximum number of lines of the target file to inline as context in the rewrite prompt. When the file exceeds this, a window of this many lines centered on the selection is used instead.
fullFileMaxLines.markdownDescription: Maximum number of lines of the target file to inline as context in the rewrite prompt. When the file exceeds this, a window of this many lines centered on the selection is used instead.

variantsByModel.description: Built-in variant definitions keyed by model-name regex pattern.
variantsByModel.markdownDescription: Built-in variant definitions keyed by model-name regex pattern.

otlp.description: OpenTelemetry OTLP collector configuration. Keys follow otlp auto-configure settings.
otlp.markdownDescription: OpenTelemetry OTLP collector configuration. Keys follow otlp auto-configure settings.

netrcFile.description: Path to a custom netrc credential file. When null, searches ~/.netrc or ~/_netrc.
netrcFile.markdownDescription: Path to a custom netrc credential file. When null, searches ~/.netrc or ~/_netrc.

title.description: Whether to automatically generate a title for new chats.
title.markdownDescription: Whether to automatically generate a title for new chats.

plugins.description: Plugin system for loading external configuration from git repos or local paths. Each key (except 'install') is a named plugin source with a 'source' URL or path. 'install' lists plugin names to install from any registered source.
plugins.markdownDescription: Plugin system for loading external configuration from git repos or local paths. Each key (except `install`) is a named plugin source with a `source` URL or path. `install` lists plugin names to install from any registered source.

install.description: List of plugin names to install from registered sources.
install.markdownDescription: List of plugin names to install from registered sources.

source.description: Git URL or local path to a plugin repository containing .eca-plugin/marketplace.json.
source.markdownDescription: Git URL or local path to a plugin repository containing `.eca-plugin/marketplace.json`.

remote.description: Remote web control server configuration. When enabled, starts an embedded HTTP server allowing a web frontend (web.eca.dev) to observe and control chat sessions in real-time.
remote.markdownDescription: Remote web control server configuration. When enabled, starts an embedded HTTP server allowing a web frontend (`web.eca.dev`) to observe and control chat sessions in real-time.

host.description: Host used in the logged URL for web.eca.dev to connect back to. Can be a LAN IP, public IP, domain, or tunnel URL. When unset, auto-detected via InetAddress/getLocalHost.
host.markdownDescription: Host used in the logged URL for `web.eca.dev` to connect back to. Can be a LAN IP, public IP, domain, or tunnel URL. When unset, auto-detected via `InetAddress/getLocalHost`.

port.description: Port the HTTP server listens on. When unset, tries port 7777, then 7778, 7779, etc. up to 20 attempts.
port.markdownDescription: Port the HTTP server listens on. When unset, tries port `7777`, then `7778`, `7779`, etc. up to 20 attempts.

password.description: Auth token for Bearer authentication. When unset, a 32-byte hex token is auto-generated and logged to stderr.
password.markdownDescription: Auth token for Bearer authentication. When unset, a 32-byte hex token is auto-generated and logged to stderr.

network.description: Network configuration for custom CA certificates and mTLS client certificates. Values support dynamic string interpolation (e.g. '${env:SSL_CERT_FILE}').
network.markdownDescription: Network configuration for custom CA certificates and mTLS client certificates. Values support dynamic string interpolation (e.g. `${env:SSL_CERT_FILE}`).

caCertFile.description: Path to a PEM file containing custom CA certificates. These are added to the JVM default trust store, so public CAs remain trusted. Falls back to SSL_CERT_FILE or NODE_EXTRA_CA_CERTS environment variables.
caCertFile.markdownDescription: Path to a PEM file containing custom CA certificates. These are added to the JVM default trust store, so public CAs remain trusted. Falls back to `SSL_CERT_FILE` or `NODE_EXTRA_CA_CERTS` environment variables.

clientCert.description: Path to a PEM file containing the client certificate for mutual TLS (mTLS). Falls back to ECA_CLIENT_CERT environment variable.
clientCert.markdownDescription: Path to a PEM file containing the client certificate for mutual TLS (mTLS). Falls back to `ECA_CLIENT_CERT` environment variable.

clientKey.description: Path to a PEM file containing the client private key for mutual TLS (mTLS). Supports both unencrypted and encrypted PKCS8 keys. Falls back to ECA_CLIENT_KEY environment variable.
clientKey.markdownDescription: Path to a PEM file containing the client private key for mutual TLS (mTLS). Supports both unencrypted and encrypted PKCS8 keys. Falls back to `ECA_CLIENT_KEY` environment variable.

clientKeyPassphrase.description: Passphrase for an encrypted client private key. Only needed when the key file is encrypted. Falls back to ECA_CLIENT_KEY_PASSPHRASE environment variable.
clientKeyPassphrase.markdownDescription: Passphrase for an encrypted client private key. Only needed when the key file is encrypted. Falls back to `ECA_CLIENT_KEY_PASSPHRASE` environment variable.

variantPayload.description: Additional request payload fields applied when a variant is selected. Empty object (`{}`) can be used to remove a built-in variant override.
variantPayload.markdownDescription: Additional request payload fields applied when a variant is selected. Empty object (`{}`) can be used to remove a built-in variant override.

variantsByModelEntry.description: Variant set applied when the model name matches this regex key.
variantsByModelEntry.markdownDescription: Variant set applied when the model name matches this regex key.

variants.description: Named variants provided for matching models.
variants.markdownDescription: Named variants provided for matching models.

excludeProviders.description: Provider names for which this regex-based variant set should not apply.
excludeProviders.markdownDescription: Provider names for which this regex-based variant set should not apply.

api.description: Restrict variants to the given API type(s). String for exact match, array for any-of. Absent = match all.
api.markdownDescription: Restrict variants to the given API type(s). String for exact match, array for any-of. Absent = match all.

api.description: The API protocol to use for this provider.
api.markdownDescription: The API protocol to use for this provider.

fetchModels.description: Whether to fetch available models from the provider's API.
fetchModels.markdownDescription: Whether to fetch available models from the provider's API.

url.description: Base URL for the provider's API. Supports dynamic strings like ${env:VAR} or ${cmd:command}.
url.markdownDescription: Base URL for the provider's API. Supports dynamic strings like `${env:VAR}` or `${cmd:command}`.

key.description: API key for authentication. Supports dynamic strings like ${env:MY_API_KEY}, ${netrc:host} or ${cmd:pass show eca/api-key}.
key.markdownDescription: API key for authentication. Supports dynamic strings like `${env:MY_API_KEY}`, `${netrc:host}` or `${cmd:pass show eca/api-key}`.

keyRc.description: Credential file lookup in format [login@]machine[:port] for netrc-based authentication.
keyRc.markdownDescription: Credential file lookup in format [login@]machine[:port] for netrc-based authentication.

auth.description: Authentication endpoint overrides for providers that use OAuth device flow. Used when the provider's identity server differs from the default (e.g. enterprise or self-hosted instances).
auth.markdownDescription: Authentication endpoint overrides for providers that use OAuth device flow. Used when the provider's identity server differs from the default (e.g. enterprise or self-hosted instances).

url.description: Base URL of the identity provider. OAuth device-flow endpoints are derived from this URL.
url.markdownDescription: Base URL of the identity provider. OAuth device-flow endpoints are derived from this URL.

clientId.description: OAuth client ID to use for the device-flow. Defaults to the provider's public client ID when omitted.
clientId.markdownDescription: OAuth client ID to use for the device-flow. Defaults to the provider's public client ID when omitted.

completionUrlRelativePath.description: Custom relative URL path for completion requests.
completionUrlRelativePath.markdownDescription: Custom relative URL path for completion requests.

thinkTagStart.description: Custom start tag for thinking/reasoning blocks in model responses.
thinkTagStart.markdownDescription: Custom start tag for thinking/reasoning blocks in model responses.

thinkTagEnd.description: Custom end tag for thinking/reasoning blocks in model responses.
thinkTagEnd.markdownDescription: Custom end tag for thinking/reasoning blocks in model responses.

retryRules.description: Custom retry rules. Each rule can match by HTTP status code and/or error text regex pattern. When matched, the request is retried with exponential backoff.
retryRules.markdownDescription: Custom retry rules. Each rule can match by HTTP status code and/or error text regex pattern. When matched, the request is retried with exponential backoff.

errorPattern.description: Regex pattern to match against any error text — response body, error message, or exception message (case-insensitive). Useful for connection-level errors that have no HTTP status.
errorPattern.markdownDescription: Regex pattern to match against any error text — response body, error message, or exception message (case-insensitive). Useful for connection-level errors that have no HTTP status.

label.description: Human-readable label shown in the retry progress message (e.g. 'Rate limited').
label.markdownDescription: Human-readable label shown in the retry progress message (e.g. 'Rate limited').

models.description: Available models for this provider. Each key is the model alias.
models.markdownDescription: Available models for this provider. Each key is the model alias.

cacheRetention.description: Prompt cache retention for Anthropic. 'short' uses 5-min TTL (default), 'long' uses 1-hour TTL at higher write cost. Only applies when hitting the direct Anthropic API.
cacheRetention.markdownDescription: Prompt cache retention for Anthropic. `short` uses 5-min TTL (default), `long` uses 1-hour TTL at higher write cost. Only applies when hitting the direct Anthropic API.

modelName.description: The actual model identifier sent to the API, if different from the alias key.
modelName.markdownDescription: The actual model identifier sent to the API, if different from the alias key.

extraPayload.description: Additional fields to include in the API request payload.
extraPayload.markdownDescription: Additional fields to include in the API request payload.

extraHeaders.description: Additional HTTP headers to include in API requests.
extraHeaders.markdownDescription: Additional HTTP headers to include in API requests.

reasoningHistory.description: How to handle reasoning/thinking history in conversation context.
reasoningHistory.markdownDescription: How to handle reasoning/thinking history in conversation context.

variants.description: Named payload presets for this model. Merged with built-in variants; same-name entries override built-ins. Setting a variant to {} removes that built-in variant.
variants.markdownDescription: Named payload presets for this model. Merged with built-in variants; same-name entries override built-ins. Setting a variant to `{}` removes that built-in variant.

inherit.description: Name of another agent to inherit configuration from. The current agent's settings are deep-merged on top of the inherited agent's settings.
inherit.markdownDescription: Name of another agent to inherit configuration from. The current agent's settings are deep-merged on top of the inherited agent's settings.

mode.description: Agent mode. 'primary' for standalone agents, 'subagent' for agent-spawnable agents.
mode.markdownDescription: Agent mode. 'primary' for standalone agents, 'subagent' for agent-spawnable agents.

description.description: Description of this agent's purpose. Required for subagents — shown to the LLM so it knows when to spawn this agent. Supports dynamic strings like ${file:path} and ${classpath:path}.
description.markdownDescription: Description of this agent's purpose. Required for subagents — shown to the LLM so it knows when to spawn this agent. Supports dynamic strings like `${file:path}` and `${classpath:path}`.

systemPrompt.description: System prompt for this agent. Overrides the default system prompt. Supports dynamic strings like ${file:path} and ${classpath:path}.
systemPrompt.markdownDescription: System prompt for this agent. Overrides the default system prompt. Supports dynamic strings like `${file:path}` and `${classpath:path}`.

maxSteps.description: Maximum number of tool-call steps before the agent is halted. Useful for limiting subagent execution.
maxSteps.markdownDescription: Maximum number of tool-call steps before the agent is halted. Useful for limiting subagent execution.

defaultModel.description: Default model for this agent, overriding the global default.
defaultModel.markdownDescription: Default model for this agent, overriding the global default.

variant.description: Default variant for this agent. Used when available for the selected model.
variant.markdownDescription: Default variant for this agent. Used when available for the selected model.

disabledTools.description: Tools to disable for this agent.
disabledTools.markdownDescription: Tools to disable for this agent.

autoCompactPercentage.description: Context window usage percentage at which auto-compact triggers for this agent.
autoCompactPercentage.markdownDescription: Context window usage percentage at which auto-compact triggers for this agent.

hook.description: A hook configuration for running shell actions on events.
hook.markdownDescription: A hook configuration for running shell actions on events.

type.description: The event type that triggers this hook.
type.markdownDescription: The event type that triggers this hook.

matcher.description: Matches *ToolCall hooks; unmatched hooks are skipped. String: legacy regex against server__tool-name. Object: tool selector map with optional argsMatchers.
matcher.markdownDescription: Matches `*ToolCall` hooks; unmatched hooks are skipped. **String**: legacy regex against `server__tool-name`. **Object**: tool selector map with optional `argsMatchers`.

oneOf.description: Tool selector map. Keys follow toolApproval selectors: full tool name (server__tool-name), native ECA tool name, or server name. Empty rule {} matches without argument filtering.
oneOf.markdownDescription: Tool selector map. Keys follow `toolApproval` selectors: full tool name (`server__tool-name`), native ECA tool name, or server name. Empty rule `{}` matches without argument filtering.

visible.description: Whether to show hook execution in chat.
visible.markdownDescription: Whether to show hook execution in chat.

runOnError.description: For postToolCall hooks, whether to run even if the tool errored.
runOnError.markdownDescription: For postToolCall hooks, whether to run even if the tool errored.

actions.description: List of actions to execute when the hook triggers.
actions.markdownDescription: List of actions to execute when the hook triggers.

hookAction.description: A shell action executed by a hook.
hookAction.markdownDescription: A shell action executed by a hook.

file.description: Path to a shell script file to execute.
file.markdownDescription: Path to a shell script file to execute.

timeout.description: Timeout in milliseconds for this action.
timeout.markdownDescription: Timeout in milliseconds for this action.

description.description: Description of what the tool does. Used by the LLM to decide when to use it.
description.markdownDescription: Description of what the tool does. Used by the LLM to decide when to use it.

toolCallConfig.description: Tool call configuration including approval rules and tool-specific settings.
toolCallConfig.markdownDescription: Tool call configuration including approval rules and tool-specific settings.

maxLines.description: Maximum number of lines returned by read_file.
maxLines.markdownDescription: Maximum number of lines returned by read_file.

path.description: Custom shell executable path. Overrides the default platform shell (bash on Linux/macOS, powershell on Windows).
path.markdownDescription: Custom shell executable path. Overrides the default platform shell (`bash` on Linux/macOS, `powershell` on Windows).

args.description: Arguments passed to the shell before the script argument. E.g. ["-l", "-c"] for bash.
args.markdownDescription: Arguments passed to the shell before the script argument. E.g. `["-l", "-c"]` for bash.

summaryMaxLength.description: Maximum length of shell command summary.
summaryMaxLength.markdownDescription: Maximum length of shell command summary.

outputTruncation.description: Output truncation settings for tool results.
outputTruncation.markdownDescription: Output truncation settings for tool results.

lines.description: Maximum number of lines in tool output.
lines.markdownDescription: Maximum number of lines in tool output.

sizeKb.description: Maximum size in kilobytes for tool output.
sizeKb.markdownDescription: Maximum size in kilobytes for tool output.

byDefault.description: Default approval mode for tools not explicitly configured.
byDefault.markdownDescription: Default approval mode for tools not explicitly configured.

allow.description: Tools that are automatically allowed. Key is tool or server name.
allow.markdownDescription: Tools that are automatically allowed. Key is tool or server name.

ask.description: Tools that require user approval. Key is tool or server name.
ask.markdownDescription: Tools that require user approval. Key is tool or server name.

deny.description: Tools that are denied. Key is tool or server name.
deny.markdownDescription: Tools that are denied. Key is tool or server name.

approvalMatcher.description: Matcher configuration for a tool approval rule.
approvalMatcher.markdownDescription: Matcher configuration for a tool approval rule.

argsMatchers.description: Map of argument name to list of Java regex patterns to match against.
argsMatchers.markdownDescription: Map of argument name to list of Java regex patterns to match against.

hookMatcherEntry.description: Hook matcher rule. Use argsMatchers to require argument values to match Java regex patterns.
hookMatcherEntry.markdownDescription: Hook matcher rule. Use `argsMatchers` to require argument values to match Java regex patterns.

argsMatchers.description: Tool argument name to Java regex alternatives. Every listed argument must exist and match at least one pattern.
argsMatchers.markdownDescription: Tool argument name to Java regex alternatives. Every listed argument must exist and match at least one pattern.

mcpServer.description: MCP server configuration. Use 'url' for remote HTTP servers or 'command' for stdio servers.
mcpServer.markdownDescription: MCP server configuration. Use 'url' for remote HTTP servers or 'command' for stdio servers.

url.description: URL for remote HTTP-streamable or SSE MCP servers.
url.markdownDescription: URL for remote HTTP-streamable or SSE MCP servers.

command.description: Command to launch a stdio MCP server.
command.markdownDescription: Command to launch a stdio MCP server.

args.description: Arguments for the stdio MCP server command.
args.markdownDescription: Arguments for the stdio MCP server command.

env.description: Environment variables to set for the MCP server process.
env.markdownDescription: Environment variables to set for the MCP server process.

disabled.description: Whether this MCP server is disabled.
disabled.markdownDescription: Whether this MCP server is disabled.

headers.description: Custom HTTP headers to include in requests to this MCP server. If an Authorization header is set, OAuth is skipped entirely.
headers.markdownDescription: Custom HTTP headers to include in requests to this MCP server. If an `Authorization` header is set, OAuth is skipped entirely.

clientId.description: OAuth client ID for servers that require a pre-registered OAuth application (e.g. Databricks, Slack). When set, dynamic client registration is skipped.
clientId.markdownDescription: OAuth client ID for servers that require a pre-registered OAuth application (e.g. Databricks, Slack). When set, dynamic client registration is skipped.

clientSecret.description: OAuth client secret for servers that require confidential OAuth (e.g. Slack MCP). Used together with clientId for token exchange.
clientSecret.markdownDescription: OAuth client secret for servers that require confidential OAuth (e.g. Slack MCP). Used together with `clientId` for token exchange.

oauthPort.description: Fixed port for the OAuth callback server. Required by providers like Slack that mandate pre-registered redirect URIs. When set, the callback uses HTTPS with a bundled localhost certificate. Register https://localhost:<port>/auth/callback as the redirect URI in your OAuth app.
oauthPort.markdownDescription: Fixed port for the OAuth callback server. Required by providers like Slack that mandate pre-registered redirect URIs. When set, the callback uses HTTPS with a bundled localhost certificate. Register `https://localhost:<port>/auth/callback` as the redirect URI in your OAuth app.

prompts.description: Custom prompt configurations. Values support dynamic strings like ${file:path} and ${classpath:path}.
prompts.markdownDescription: Custom prompt configurations. Values support dynamic strings like ${file:path} and ${classpath:path}.

tools.description: Custom descriptions for specific tools. Key is the tool name.
tools.markdownDescription: Custom descriptions for specific tools. Key is the tool name.
